case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. GLENDA A. PEREYRA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $250.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PEREYRA, GLENDA A.
